case_title: ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ELIJAH WATSON

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM AMRK SCHREIBER FILED BY ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO
